title: BrandColorToken
description: The shape of an entry in the BRAND_COLORS manifest at apps/marketing/src/components/common/colors.ts after this feature lands. New entries MUST conform to this schema; pre-existing legacy entries (purple, darkPurple1, darkPurple2, lightGreen3) MAY omit the family/shade fields temporarily and are not invalidated by this contract.

value.description: Stable kebab- or camelCase key. Used as the Contentful dropdown value and the TypeScript prop value. Naming convention for new tokens: '{family}{Shade}' for family tokens (e.g. purpleDark, blueMid), plain 'black' or 'white' for the standalone tokens.

displayName.description: Author-facing label rendered in the Contentful dropdown.

cssVar.description: Either a `var(--codeai-...)` reference into the SCSS primitives layer, or a literal value where no CSS variable indirection is needed (e.g. 'white', '#000000'). The referenced CSS variable MUST be defined in the primitive-colors SCSS layer.

family.description: The color family. Used by the contrast switch to shift within a hue. Black and White are their own families and never shift to a different family.

shade.description: The position within the family ladder. 'n-a' is reserved for Black and White, which have no shade ladder.
